case_title: LEGALINK INC. VS. BRADSHAW AND ASSOCIATES et al

docket_entries.description: MINI MINUTES FOR FEB-27-2012 02:00 PM FOR DEPT 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-27-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) DREXEL BRADSHAW; TO OBTAIN ANSWER(S) OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). THE DEC-23-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NO APPEARANCE, NOR OBJECTION FILED. CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING FEB-27-2012 AT 2:00PM. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEGALINK INC.
